description: Granting a function a broad or wildcard IAM role, turning a single compromised function into a wide blast radius.
body: Failure mode: a function is attached a shared admin or wildcard (action:*, resource:*) role for convenience, so if its code or a dependency is compromised the attacker inherits broad cloud access. Detection signals: the execution policy contains wildcards or permissions the handler never uses; one role is reused across many functions. Do not over-permission functions. Safer fallback: give each function its own role scoped to the exact actions and resource ARNs it uses, deny by default, and re-test that the function still works with the tightened policy.
